metadata.name: Create Voice of the Customer Report

description: An agent must synthesize data from surveys, interviews, and support tickets to create a 'Voice of the Customer' report.

nodes.task_description: Ingest data from three sources: a survey results CSV, interview transcripts, and a dump of support ticket subjects.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully loads all three data sources.

nodes.task_description: Identify the top 3 positive themes and top 3 negative themes that appear across all data sources.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies common themes like 'Excellent Customer Service' (Positive) and 'Product is Buggy' (Negative).

nodes.task_description: Draft a report summarizing these themes, providing a supporting example for each from one of the sources.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a comprehensive report with evidence-backed themes.
